executives.name: Andrew Sharp
executives.background: Mr. Sharp is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in the industry. He joined Skeena in 2021 and was appointed CFO in 2022.

executives.name: Stephen Quin
executives.background: Mr. Quin is a geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including executive roles at Midas Gold and Capstone Mining.

board_of_directors.background: Mr. Quin is a geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including executive roles at Midas Gold and Capstone Mining.
